transcript.text:
[Tzuyang in New York]
[The heart of NY: Times Square]
It's so cool that I'm here right now
[MLB invitation] [All clubs representative foods mukbang mission]
[Incheon International Airport]
America Manhattan
From MLB
[Private invitation from the MLB secretariat]
[Arrival at the New York JFK Airport]
Now that I'm here, it feels like I'm in America
Wait, it is America
I'm very excited
I want to take him home
I'm on my way to eat Shake Shack Burger
It's very famous in Korea
I still haven't tried it in Korea

And now I'm trying it here in America
What's unique is that it's located inside the park
[Shake Shack Burger located in Madison Square Park]
There are a lot of people in line right now, so I may be here for a while
How do I order?
How do I make an order?
I'm doomed
[Embarrassed]
Don't they call it Coca-Cola here too?
I studied before I came here
But as I was trying to talk
I completely blanked out
[English Brain Fart]
I practiced like that
I blanked out so I couldn't really talk
That's embarrassing

This doesn't look like enough food
So good
It's very crispy and fresh
I thought it was going to be salty, but it's not
Let's get the fry and dip it in a chocolate milkshake
I heard they do this with either the chocolate or the vanilla shake
Sweet Salty Sweet Salty
Let's try the burger now
Bon appetit
The original Shack Burger
The size is very..
It's not big for sure
I thought it was going to be big
[Shack Burger] [Beef patty, tomato, lettuce, shack sauce, cheese]
The meat is like a homemade patty
That's good

I'm not sure if you can see it, but you can see the red meat
It's like it's undercooked
I'm sure it's fine because it's beef
It's very good The meat juice is like
The camera
[Chat: It's not meat juice, it's just grease]
The buns are chewy
I have 2 last bites left
I heard they drink a lot of coke
but the chocolate milkshake is drunk more with the burgers
It's very sweet
Tasty regardless
I'm not sure if this is the shroom burger or the chicken burger, but let's try it
There's cheese inside
And the outside is very crispy
[Shroom Burger (vegan)] [Monster cheese and cheddar, fried portabello mushroom patty with lettuce, tomato, shack sauce]

This big thing is mushroom?
It's a huge mushroom
It's mushroom
Hotdog when you're in NY
The buns are
very similar to the burger buns
The sausage is salty
It's a bit salty
I can taste some sweetness too
Everything here feels like it has a lot of calories
I feel getting fat
I ordered 2 more burgers
2 burgers and some fries
French Fries
I kept saying french fries, so I forgot what it was called in Korean
I'm so dumb

Very salty but still tasty
I'm going to move to somewhere bright
Give me a sec
My order came out
I got 1 hamburger and 1 shake shack burger
I think this one is the shake shack burger
It's similar to the shack burger?
This one is the hamburger
What is this..
It looks like the patty slipped out
Wait, it's not
It has no sauce Just the patty
I'll try this first
[Hamburger] [Potato buns and regular beef patty] [You can choose your own toppings if you'd like]
It has no sauce
It's pretty dry The patty itself is dry

[She didn't know she was supposed to add her own toppings]
They're saying you're so pretty
Who's pretty?
Me!?
It's the smoke shack burger It has bacon inside
It seems like a shack burger with bacon
[Smoke Shack Burger] [A classic Shack Burger, minus the lettuce and tomato, and with the addition of cherry pepper relish and Niman Ranch applewood-smoked bacon]
It's so salty
It's not the patty
The bacon is really salty
What is this chunk of salt?
Salty salty salty
Guys, don't eat the smoke shack burger here
It's very salty
It's really good
People are looking at me

They find me interesting
[Americans can subscribe as well!]
They want a photo with you
Why did you tell them
Just a moment, I'll go take a picture with them
That's so embarrassing
Chicken Burger this time
[Chicken Burger] [Antibiotic-free, crispy chicken breast with lettuce, pickles, and buttermilk herb mayo on a non-GMO Martin’s Potato Roll]
Chicken breast meat
It's been sitting here for a while, but it's still crispy
I almost ate this!
They only put 1 in here
I almost ate it
[Tzuyang hates pickles :'(]
It's my 5th burger
Last one

This one is the Shack Stack Burger
I don't know what's different about this though It's like the same with the Shack Burger
[Shack Stack Burger] [Cheeseburger and a ’Shroom Burger topped with lettuce, tomato, shack sauce]
It's not enough food
It's pretty good
Thanks everyone~
Time to collect all the trash
[MLB Mukbang coming soon!]
